title: Sandbox Management
subtitle: Inspect and operate managed sandboxes across providers.

empty.title: No managed sandboxes
empty.subtitle: Create a managed sandbox or wait for a provider to register one.

create.title: Create sandbox
create.name: Sandbox name
create.providerHint: This provider is visible in the dashboard model but creation is not wired in this phase.

screenshot.title: Sandbox screenshot
screenshot.noPreview: Screenshot captured. Preview rendering will be added later.

console.title: Sandbox console
console.notice: The console does not change sandbox occupancy, but commands directly affect this sandbox environment.

config.title: Sandbox configuration
config.name: Sandbox name
config.idleTimeoutHint: With the temporary policy, sandboxes can be cleaned after this idle duration. Empty or 0 disables idle cleanup.
config.expiresAtHint: Optional. The sandbox can be cleaned after this time.

tooltips.takeover: Bind the current dashboard session to this sandbox and obtain control. If another controller exists, control is transferred.
tooltips.console: Open a shell console without changing the sandbox lease.

destroyConfirm.title: Destroy sandbox?
destroyConfirm.message: Destroy {name}? This shuts down the sandbox and removes its managed record.

messages.createUnknown: Sandbox state is unknown. Refresh manually or inspect the backend.
messages.createRefreshUnstable: Sandbox status refresh became unstable during creation. Refresh manually later.
messages.createNotVisible: Sandbox {sandboxId} is not visible in the list yet. Refresh manually later.
messages.createTimedOut: Sandbox {sandboxId} is still processing. Refresh manually later.
messages.takeover: Current session now controls this sandbox.
